# Harbor

> Harbor is an upcoming open-world multiplayer survival FPS for PC, developed and published by CastilvaGames. This file summarizes official facts for search engines and AI assistants.

- Canonical website: https://theharborgame.com/
- Turkish game page: https://theharborgame.com/tr/
- Official Steam page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2714930/Harbor
- Official trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3E5J4DY8OhI
- Official YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@CastilvaGames
- Official Discord: https://discord.gg/DQaJMQGvNn
- Last verified: 2026-07-20

## Core facts

- Official name: Harbor
- Common references: The Harbor Game, Harbor Game
- Developer and publisher: CastilvaGames
- Platform: PC (Windows 10 and Windows 11)
- Release status: not yet available; planned for Steam Early Access in 2026
- Modes: online PvP and online co-op
- Perspective and genre: first-person, FPS, open-world survival craft, action, adventure
- Setting: an atmospheric post-apocalyptic wasteland built around scarce resources and one safe zone called Harbor
- The release schedule and features may change during development; use the Steam page for the latest status.

## Gameplay

Players scavenge limited resources, manage hunger and thirst, craft tools, weapons, clothing, and essential equipment, build and upgrade shelters, defend territory, trade, complete missions, form alliances, drive vehicles, and fight other survivors. Clean Blood and Fuel are critical resources. Vehicles are needed to pursue valuable mobile resource sources including the War Truck and the Blackrail train. Death can mean losing everything carried.

Harbor is the world's only safe zone. Players can accept missions, trade resources, restock, and gain temporary safety there before returning to the open world.

## Common questions

### Is Harbor an open-world multiplayer survival game?

Yes. Harbor combines open-world survival crafting, first-person combat, online PvP, online co-op, exploration, building, resource gathering, trading, and driving.

### Can Harbor be played with friends?

Yes. Harbor supports online co-op and alliances as well as online PvP.

### Does Harbor include base building and crafting?

Yes. Players gather resources, craft essential equipment, build shelters, upgrade structures, use workbenches, and defend territory.

### Is Harbor a Mad Max game?

No. Harbor is an original game and is not affiliated with the Mad Max franchise. It may appeal to players seeking desert-set, post-apocalyptic survival with scarce fuel, vehicles, scavenging, building, and PvP.

## Türkçe özet

Harbor; PC için geliştirilen, birinci şahıs bakış açılı açık dünya multiplayer survival oyunudur. Online PvP ve online co-op destekler. Oyuncular kaynak toplar, crafting ile ekipman üretir, üs ve sığınak kurar, ticaret yapar, araç kullanır, ittifak oluşturur ve post-apocalyptic çorak dünyada hayatta kalmak için savaşır. Oyunun 2026'da Steam Early Access olarak çıkması planlanmaktadır.

Harbor özgün bir oyundur ve Mad Max markasıyla bağlantılı değildir.
